title: OB Checkup — 8 Weeks
notes: First OB appointment. Confirmed heartbeat on ultrasound, 8w2d. Discussed prenatal vitamins and diet.

title: Follow-up — Spotting Concern
notes: Urgent visit for light bleeding. Ultrasound showed small subchorionic hematoma — told to rest, monitor. Baby looks fine.

title: Nuchal Translucency Scan — 11 Weeks
notes: NT measurement 1.4mm — low risk. Blood work (NIPT) sent out. Everything looks great!

title: OB Checkup — 14 Weeks
notes: NIPT results all normal. Heartbeat 152 bpm. Officially in second trimester. Discussed anatomy scan at 20 weeks.

title: Anatomy Scan — 20 Weeks
notes: Scheduled. Will find out sex if baby cooperates!
